content_body: Anthony and I came to the mountains together, along with Mildred. This was our first trip together, and a very special one for Mildred. We had a wonderful time hiking to waterfalls, rivers, and bridges. It was nice to come back to this beautiful cabin and the sound of the river, not to mention the sky full of stars to be enjoyed on the deck. I am very grateful for this trip, and for Anthony and Mildred.
title: Grateful for this Trip
